category_sources: source_facts.description says Verilator is a Verilog simulator; official GitHub describes it as an open-source SystemVerilog simulator and lint system.
display_name_sources: Official repository and documentation use the Verilator name; source_facts.name is verilator.
docs_sources: Official Verilator User's Guide is hosted at verilator.org/guide/latest.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/verilator/verilator; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Verilog simulation; official repository description adds SystemVerilog simulator and lint system.
